---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <h1 class="hero-name">Research Output</h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">
      Conferences &nbsp;·&nbsp; Presentations &nbsp;·&nbsp; Media &nbsp;·&nbsp; Peer Review &nbsp;·&nbsp; Funding
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Conference Presentations

| Year | Conference | Title | Location | Type |
|------|-----------|-------|----------|------|
| 2025 | Pennington Symposium | Residence at moderate altitude and metabolic markers | Baton Rouge, LA | Oral |
| 2024 | NATA Annual Meeting | Intravenous Iron Lower Rates of Anaemia in Active Females | Bologna, Italy | Oral |
| 2024 | AusIron 2024 | Iron and Female Athletes | Online | Oral |
| 2024 | NATA | What is Normal Iron Metabolism? | Online | Oral |
| 2024 | NATA | TikTok and Iron Deficiency Awareness | Online | Poster |
| 2024 | NATA | IRONWOMAN Trial Results | Online | Oral |
| 2023 | NATA Annual Meeting | Screening and Assessing Iron Status in Active Women | Online | Oral |
| 2022 | NATA Annual Meeting | Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of IV Iron for Non-Anaemic Iron Deficiency | Online | Oral |
| 2021 | SMA Conference | Acute Hypoxia and Blood Glucose in Type 1 Diabetes | Online | Oral |
| 2021 | NATA Annual Meeting | Need to Screen for Anaemia in Female Populations | Online | Oral |
| 2021 | ISTRC (Int. Society for Twin Research Congress) | The Misogyny of Iron Deficiency | Online | Oral |
| 2021 | ESSA Conference | Misogyny of Iron Deficiency | Online | Oral |
| 2021 | ESSA Conference | Acute Hypoxia and Type 1 Diabetes | Online | Oral |
| 2021 | SMA Conference | Need to Screen for Anaemia | Online | Oral |
| 2020 | NATA Annual Meeting | Are You Really Fit and Healthy? | Online | Oral |
| 2020 | NATA Annual Meeting | Is Fingerprick Testing Accurate for Iron Assessment? | Online | Oral |
| 2019 | Telethon Kids Institute | Acute Hypoxia on Blood Glucose in T1D: Preliminary Findings | Perth, Australia | Oral |
| 2019 | Perth Children's Hospital | Acute Hypoxia on Blood Glucose in T1D: Final Results | Perth, Australia | Oral |
| 2018 | Telethon Kids Institute | Acute Hypoxia on Blood Glucose in T1D: Rationale and Design | Perth, Australia | Oral |

---

## Invited Presentations

| Year | Title | Venue | Audience |
|------|-------|-------|----------|
| 2024 | Iron and the Human Body | UWA School of Human Sciences (IMED1108) | Medical students |
| 2024 | Navigating Iron Deficiency in Clinical Practice | Pennington Biomedical Research Centre | Research staff & fellows |
| 2023 | Iron and the Human Body | UWA School of Human Sciences (IMED1108) | Medical students |
| 2023 | Iron Deficiency in Exercising Females: What We Now Know | PESA WA (Physical Education & Sport Association) | PE educators |
| 2022 | Iron in the Diet: From Food to Physiology | UWA School of Human Sciences (IMED1108) | Medical students |
| 2022 | Iron Deficiency Beyond Anaemia | UWA Postgraduate Research Symposium | Postgraduate researchers |
| 2021 | Novel Research in T1D and High-Altitude Exercise | UWA Diabetes Research Group | Clinicians & researchers |

---

## Media Engagement

**50+ media appearances** covering research on iron deficiency, women's health, exercise physiology, and the IRONWOMAN trial.

Notable outlets include:

```{=html}
<div class="media-grid" style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; margin: 2rem 0;">
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">ABC Radio</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">Sydney Morning Herald</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">Brisbane Times</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">The Age</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">Medical News Today</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">MSN</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">Sports Injury Bulletin</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">Healio</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">EurekAlert</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">US Pharmacist</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">Medpage Today</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">UWA News</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">Medical Life Sciences News</div>
  <div style="text-align: center; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">Times of India</div>
</div>
```

---

## Peer Review Activity

**Academic Editor:** PLOS One

**Guest Editor:** Women's Health

**Active reviewer for 20+ journals** across haematology, sports science, nutrition, internal medicine, and clinical research:

```{=html}
<div class="toolkit-row">
  <span class="toolkit-chip">BMJ</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">JAMA</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">BJSM</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Scientific Reports (Nature)</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">BJA (British Journal of Anaesthesia)</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">British Journal of Surgery</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">British Journal of Nutrition</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">JSAMS (Journal of Sports Sciences)</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">JCSM (J Cachexia Sarcopenia Muscle)</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Vox Sanguinis</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Internal Medicine Journal</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">JCEM (J Clinical Endocrinology & Metabolism)</span>
</div>
```

---

## Research Funding

**Total research funding: ~$862,000 AUD**

| Grant / Award | Funder | Year | Value (AUD) | Role |
|--------------|--------|------|-------------|------|
| IRONWOMAN Pharmacosmos RCT | Pharmacosmos A/S | 2019–2025 | $555,460 | Co-investigator |
| RTP PhD Studentship | University of Western Australia | 2020–2024 | $180,000 | Recipient |
| NHMRC DARP Clinical Trial Grant | NHMRC | 2023–2027 | $60,000 | Chief Investigator |
| Pharmacosmos PhD Top-Up Scholarship | Pharmacosmos A/S | 2019–2024 | $30,000 | Recipient |
| Telethon Kids Institute Seeding Grant | Telethon Kids | 2019 | $17,000 | Co-investigator |
| NHMRC CRE Honours Scholarship | NHMRC | 2018 | $5,000 | Recipient |
| Frank Pyke Memorial Scholarship | UWA | 2018 | $5,000 | Recipient |
| NATA Travel Grant | NATA | 2023 | $5,000 | Recipient |
| UWA Postgraduate Travel Award | University of Western Australia | 2022 | $2,500 | Recipient |
| ESSA Conference Bursary | Exercise & Sports Science Australia | 2019 | $1,000 | Recipient |
| SMA Conference Bursary | Sports Medicine Australia | 2021 | $1,000 | Recipient |

---

## Policy Citations

- **WHO (2025)** — Cited in World Health Organization guidance on iron supplementation for non-anaemic iron deficiency
- **OSHA (2024)** — Referenced in occupational health standards on iron biomarkers and worker health
- **Public Health Ontario (2023)** — Included in provincial recommendations on iron deficiency screening in community health

---

*Dr. C. W. Dugan &nbsp;·&nbsp; March 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Baton Rouge, LA*
